name: Indiana Fresh Rhubarb Creme Pie Dgsv43a
recipeIngredient: 2 cups rhubarb; fresh, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the rhubarb and scald in hot water for about 5 minutes. Drain well and place in the bottom of the pie shell.
2. In a small bowl, mix margarine, flour, and sugar together. Beat the egg yolks with 3 tablespoons water and combine with the sugar mixture. Pour over the rhubarb.
3. If desired (not recommended), make a meringue from the egg whites and add to the pie. Alternatively, enjoy it cooked and eaten without the meringue.
4. Bake in an oven set to 350 degrees for 30-45 minutes. Serve with vanilla ice cream.
